data.description:
Review and polish the hero section. Analyze the current screenshot for alignment issues, spacing, visual hierarchy, and overall layout. Key areas to address:

1. Navbar centering — the stacked 'Fractal Collective' title with pill buttons on either side has alignment issues (buttons appear off-center relative to title)
2. Skyline background opacity and positioning
3. 3D fractal object placement relative to the skyline
4. Bottom text (paragraph + 'Explore our story') spacing and alignment  
5. Overall visual hierarchy and spacing between elements
6. Responsive behavior at different viewport sizes
7. Font sizing and weight balance between Jacquard title, body text, and nav buttons

Reference: Monumental Labs hero layout (stacked title, flanked by nav)
data.title: Polish hero section layout and alignment

data.body:
REVIEW: PASS -- All 7 acceptance criteria met.

**1. Navbar centering** -- PASS. CSS Grid grid-cols-[1fr_auto_1fr] with justify-end/justify-start correctly centers pills around the title. max-md:hidden and md:hidden breakpoints handle desktop/mobile split cleanly.

**2. Skyline fade** -- PASS. Opacity reduced to 0.35, mask-image gradient applied with both standard and -webkit- prefix, pointer-events-none set. No hard edge.

**3. 3D fractal position** -- PASS. Camera at [0, 0.8, 8] and group at [0, 0.6, 0] shift the fractal above the skyline horizon.

**4. Bottom text readability** -- PASS. hero-text-shadow CSS utility with cream-colored shadows applied to both paragraph and link. Font sizes appropriately reduced.

**5. No horizontal overflow** -- PASS. whitespace-nowrap on pills, overflow-hidden on hero section, conservative gap-2 spacing.

**6. Font hierarchy** -- PASS. Title text-5xl/6xl/7xl (Jacquard 24) > paragraph text-sm/base/lg > link text-xs/sm > pills text-[11px]. Clear descending hierarchy.

**7. TypeScript compilation** -- PASS. tsc --noEmit exits with code 0.

**Additional notes:**
- SkylineSilhouette.tsx is now orphaned (no imports) -- minor cleanup opportunity, not a blocker.
- Font stack change (Instrument Sans -> JetBrains Mono, added Instrument Serif) goes beyond plan scope but aligns with project direction.
- Delta clamping in useFrame and NoToneMapping change are good defensive improvements.
- Title sizing is slightly more aggressive than plan (added text-5xl base) -- appropriate for the multi-breakpoint range.
